reasoning: With the forecast date at November 9, 2025, there are less than two months remaining in the year. If a US ally (like South Korea or Japan) were to acquire or develop a nuclear weapon by December 31, 2025, it would require a massive and highly visible breakout effort, withdrawal from the NPT (which requires 90 days notice), a complete geopolitical crisis, and rapid weaponization of fissile material, none of which is plausible within this timeframe.
